title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Nike India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Nike India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Nike India! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Allahabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Nike India:
Nike India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nike India!
